data.title: Viewing China from Afar: The Woman Who Bridged Two Nations
data.description: On June 12, 2026 in San Francisco, a documentary titled "Viewing China from Afar: The Woman Who Bridged Two Nations" was showcased by People's Daily Online West USA. This documentary sheds light on the life and impact of Helen Foster Snow, an American journalist. Through her work, she played a crucial role in fostering mutual understanding between nations. The documentary provides a glimpse into her legacy and the contributions she made towards bridging cultural gaps.

data.title: DELLA Highlights Growing Demand for Room-by-Room Climate Control in Southern California
data.description: In the bustling city of Los Angeles, as of June 12, 2026, residents are encountering prolonged periods of scorching temperatures, heightened electricity expenses, and changing living requirements. Consequently, there is a growing need for adaptable and energy-saving cooling systems among homeowners in Southern California. This escalating demand for such solutions is witnessed throughout the area, with an increasing number of individuals seeking efficient ways to combat the heat and control costs. The trend indicates a sustained surge in interest for modern, sustainable cooling options to address the evolving climatic conditions and lifestyle demands in the region.

data.title: INTRACARE REBRANDS CLINICAL RESEARCH DIVISION AS "CAREON"
data.description: A prominent Management Services Organization based in Texas, IntraCare, has recently rebranded to CareOn and launched a new website. The organization continues its mission to provide quality research opportunities to individuals and communities in Texas. The rebranding was announced on June 12, 2026, in Addison, Texas. CareOn is focused on bringing essential research opportunities to those most in need across the state.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Announces Voting Results from Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Hemlo Mining (TSXV: HMMC) (OTCQX: HMMCF) disclosed outcomes from its 2026 Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The voting results revealed shareholders' approval across all resolutions presented at the meeting. The event highlighted significant engagement with a notable number of participants showing support for the company's plans.

data.title: PreludeDx™ Achieves New Milestones for DCIS Patients and DCISionRT® Testing
data.description: In Laguna Hills, California on June 12, 2026, Prelude Corporation (PreludeDx™), a key player in precision diagnostics for breast cancer, announced a significant achievement for DCISionRT®. This validated genomic test offers personalized recurrence risk evaluation and forecasts outcomes for individuals.

data.title: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals to Announce Interim Six-Month Phase 2 Results Evaluating Setmelanotide in Patients with Prader-Willi Syndrome
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: RYTM) revealed plans to conduct a live conference call and webcast on June 13 at 9:00 a.m. ET/8:00 a.m. CT. The discussion will revolve around interim findings from the Phase 2 trial of setmelanotide for individuals with Prader-Willi syndrome (PWS). Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a leading global biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to enhancing the lives of those affected by rare neuroendocrine disorders. This event signifies a significant development in the medical field, aiming to provide hope and better treatment options for patients with PWS.

data.title: Monolithic Power Systems Announces Second Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: Based in Schaffhausen, Switzerland, Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: MPWR) disclosed on June 12, 2026, that they are issuing a second quarter dividend of $2.00 per common share. This dividend will be distributed to all stockholders recorded as of the market's closure on June 30, 2026, with payment scheduled for July 15, 2026. MPS is a leading global provider of semiconductor-powered electronics solutions.

data.title: Inventiva announces Repayment of EIB Loans, Repurchase of a portion of EIB Warrants and the Issuance of the first two tranches under New Debt Financing
data.description: Inventiva, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Euronext Paris and NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IVA, focusing on developing oral therapies for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), completed significant transactions on June 12, 2026. This included repaying in full the EIB Loans and repurchasing a portion of existing EIB Warrants, as well as issuing Tranche A Convertible Bonds and Tranche B Amortized Bonds along with Lenders’ Warrants under a Debt Financing Transaction. These transactions resulted in net proceeds of €71,298,750.

data.title: Several crypto companies will showcase their branding at Trump's White House UFC event, a unique marketing opportunity.
data.description: The upcoming UFC fight featuring President Trump offers numerous crypto companies an unparalleled chance for corporate branding.
Iran's Araghchi: If final negotiation stage completed, agreement will be signed remotely by both sides and announced

data.title: Village Super Market, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD:VLGEA) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per Class A common share and $0.1625 per Class B common share. Shareholders of record on July 2, 2026, will receive the dividends, which are scheduled to be paid on July 23, 2026.

data.title: DIAGNOS Announces Grant of Stock Options and Adoption of Semi-Annual Reporting
data.description: In BROSSARD, Quebec, on June 12, 2026, Diagnos Inc. (DIAGNOS) revealed a corporate update. The company, listed on TSX Venture under ADK, OTCQB under DGNOF, and FWB under 4D4A, specializes in utilizing Artificial Intelligence (AI) for early identification of eye-related health issues. In a recent development, DIAGNOS disclosed the granting of a total of 1,500,000 stock options to directors and officers within the organization.
US negotiations will allow the Lebanese army to gradually return to south of the Litani - Al Arabiya citing source

data.title: TotalTek Hosts Annual Golf Charity Event to Benefit Operation Veteran Success
data.description: On June 22, an event will be held at the Grand Geneva Resort & Spa in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin to raise funds for emergency housing assistance for veterans. TotalTek, an enterprise technology and engineering company, is organizing the event. The 2026 Annual Golf Charity Event is scheduled for June 22, 2026. The purpose of the event is to raise funds for this cause.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Climbs 400 Points On Iran Deal Hopes; SpaceX Rockets Higher (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase on Friday due to optimism surrounding a potential peace deal between the U.S. and Iran. SpaceX saw a significant surge in its stock price during its debut in the market, while the satellite company faced a sharp decline. The Dow climbed by around 400 points as investors focused on the possibilities of a resolution between the two nations.

data.title: ADAMnetworks Appoints Philippe Johnston as Field CIO and Strategic Advisor
data.description: In Ottawa, Canada, Philippe Johnston has been appointed as the Field Chief Information Officer and Strategic Advisor for ADAMnetworks, tasked with spearheading the company's expansion and advancement.

data.title: PowerA and Meridian GMT Announce Strategic Partnership at FlightSimExpo 2026
data.description: The launch of the "Fueled by PowerA" program is set to revolutionize flight simulation experiences for gamers around the globe. Led by PowerA, a top-notch provider of gaming accessories, in collaboration with Meridian GMT, renowned for their advanced flight simulation hardware, this initiative aims to reach a wider audience. The program was announced on June 12, 2026, in Woodinville, Washington. This partnership is expected to enhance the experience for a significant number of players, bringing cutting-edge technology and realism to the world of flight simulation.

data.title: Solana's RSI at 33.72 & 77.5% long positions set up oversold bounce for $75 target in 2 weeks post $68.80 resistance breakout.
data.description: With Solana's Relative Strength Index (RSI) dropping to 33.72, institutional traders are maintaining 77.5% long positions, indicating a classic oversold bounce opportunity. This setup aims for a price target of $75, with the trigger for this scenario being a breakthrough above the $68.80 resistance level.
